Product ID: AA25-071A  #StopRansomware: Medusa Ransomware  Summary  The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI), Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA), and the Multi-State Information Sharing and Analysis Center (MS-ISAC) are releasing this joint advisory to disseminate known Medusa ransomware TTPs and IOCs, identified through FBI investigations as recently as February 2025.
Table 11: Impact  Technique Title  ID  Use  Data Encrypted for Impact  T1486  Medusa identified and encrypted data on target systems to interrupt availability to system and network resources.
Table 3: Initial Access  Technique Title  ID  Use  Exploit Public-Facing Application  T1190  Medusa actors exploited unpatched software or n-day vulnerabilities through common vulnerabilities and exposures.
Version History  March 12, 2025: Initial version.
